name: Block Tokens with Freeze Authority
description: Block transactions involving tokens that have freeze authority enabled

rule.message: 🚨 BLOCKED: Token has freeze authority - owner can freeze your account at any time

metadata.note: STRICT MODE - Blocks ALL tokens with freeze authority (may include legitimate projects)
metadata.recommendation: Use 'alert' action instead if you want warnings rather than blocks

name: Alert on Freezable Tokens
description: Warn when transaction involves tokens with freeze authority

rule.message: ⚠️ WARNING: Token has freeze authority - verify project trustworthiness before proceeding

name: Block if ALL Tokens Are Freezable
description: Block when every token in transaction has freeze authority (very suspicious)

rule.message: 🚨 BLOCKED: ALL tokens involved have freeze authority

name: Block if Freeze Authority is Known Scammer
description: Block tokens where freeze authority address is on your scammer blocklist

rule.message: 🚨 BLOCKED: Token freeze authority is a known scammer

metadata.note: Add known scammer addresses to the value array

name: Alert on Multiple Risky Tokens
description: Warn when transaction involves 2+ tokens with freeze authority

rule.message: ⚠️ WARNING: Multiple tokens with freeze authority detected - extra caution advised
